mapper.sql: select request_id, request_no, category_id, category_code, category_name, template_id, template_code, template_name, business_code, business_name, applicant_user_id, applicant_name, applicant_no, applicant_user_type, applicant_dept_id, applicant_dept_name, grade_id, grade_name, class_id, class_name, major, current_student_status_code, current_student_status_name, target_student_status_code, target_student_status_name, title, summary_text, request_status, current_step_index, current_step_code, current_step_name, current_assignment_type, current_reviewer_role, current_reviewer_user_id, current_reviewer_name, submitted_time, finish_time, last_action, form_data_json, attachment_json, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_affair_request
mapper.insert:
insert into sc_affair_request
request_no, category_id, category_code, category_name, template_id, template_code, template_name, business_code, business_name, applicant_user_id, applicant_name, applicant_no, applicant_user_type, applicant_dept_id, applicant_dept_name, grade_id, grade_name, class_id, class_name, major, current_student_status_code, current_student_status_name, target_student_status_code, target_student_status_name, title, summary_text, request_status, current_step_index, current_step_code, current_step_name, current_assignment_type, current_reviewer_role, current_reviewer_user_id, current_reviewer_name, submitted_time, finish_time, last_action, form_data_json, attachment_json, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{requestNo}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{templateId}, #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{businessCode}, #{businessName}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantNo}, #{applicantUserType}, #{applicantDeptId}, #{applicantDeptName}, #{gradeId}, #{gradeName}, #{classId}, #{className}, #{major}, #{currentStudentStatusCode}, #{currentStudentStatusName}, #{targetStudentStatusCode}, #{targetStudentStatusName}, #{title}, #{summaryText}, #{requestStatus}, #{currentStepIndex}, #{currentStepCode}, #{currentStepName}, #{currentAssignmentType}, #{currentReviewerRole}, #{currentReviewerUserId}, #{currentReviewerName}, #{submittedTime}, #{finishTime}, #{lastAction}, #{formDataJson}, #{attachmentJson}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.select: select date(submitted_time) as submitDate, count(*) as count from sc_affair_request where submitted_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} day) and applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} group by date(submitted_time) order by submitDate asc

select stat.template_id as templateId, t.template_code as templateCode, t.template_name as templateName, c.category_code as categoryCode, c.category_name as categoryName, t.business_code as businessCode, t.business_name as businessName, t.audience_roles as audienceRoles, t.form_schema_json as formSchemaJson, t.workflow_schema_json as workflowSchemaJson, t.allow_attachment as allowAttachment, t.allow_revoke as allowRevoke, t.apply_scope_json as applyScopeJson, t.business_rules_json as businessRulesJson, t.target_status_code as targetStatusCode, t.target_status_name as targetStatusName, stat.useCount as useCount from ( select template_id, count(*) as useCount from sc_affair_request where applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} group by template_id order by useCount desc limit #{limit} ) stat left join sc_affair_template t on t.template_id = stat.template_id left join sc_affair_category c on c.category_id = t.category_id order by stat.useCount desc
